title: Senior Quantity Surveyor — Commercial Construction (Contract)
description_raw:
Hays Construction are recruiting a Senior Quantity Surveyor on a contract basis for a large commercial construction project in Central London. Inside IR35 via approved umbrella.

The project is a £120m commercial office development. The QS role covers:
- Preparation of bills of quantities and cost plans at RIBA stages 2–5
- Sub-contractor procurement and interim valuations
- Cost reporting and final account preparation
- Attending monthly CVR meetings with the commercial manager

Profile:
- RICS chartered (MRICS) preferred
- 7+ years commercial QS experience on construction projects
- NEC or JCT contract experience required

Rate: £350–400/day inside IR35
Duration: 18 months
Start: July 2026
